message:
Remove BITZ trailing-garbage regression (#6058) ## 🔍 Problem - The handcrafted trailing-garbage BITZ fixture added in #6050 is causing flakes. - Exercising that malformed payload also pushed `read_bitz` toward non-standard validation logic on the neo path. ## 🛠️ Solution - Remove the trailing-byte validation path from `read_bitz`. - Delete the malformed BITZ fixture and its regression test. - Keep the regular single-pass decode path for valid BITZ payloads. ## 💬 Review - Focus on whether dropping the trailing-garbage coverage is the right tradeoff for `read_bitz`. 📎 Related: https://linear.app/tenzir/review/port-read-bitz-and-write-bitz-to-neo-6ece15adbaeb#comment-3fb55b98
📎 Related: https://github.com/tenzir/tenzir/pull/6050#issuecomment-4278948392
🔁 Follow-up: #6050

files.patch:
@@ -1,7 +0,0 @@
-error: unexpected 1 trailing bytes in BITZ payload
- --> tests/operators/bitz/error_trailing_garbage.tql:5:3
-  |
-5 |   read_bitz
-  |   ^^^^^^^^^ 
-  |
-  = note: failed to consume the entire Feather stream
